stages.name: targeted_unit_tests
stages.evidence: ai_context_test (schema-valid context + snapshot, missing nested fields rejected, structured commands array, legacy-payload rejection, argv0/env/shell rules, skip_reason rules, 4096 UTF-8 excerpt cap, preview backend vs operator stability, redaction fail-closed, config redact default + remote rejection, deterministic stub provider) passes; full suite green

stages.name: property_tests
stages.evidence: the stub provider is deterministic (same context yields the same advisory); redaction is deterministic and fails closed on unsupported patterns; the excerpt cap never splits a UTF-8 codepoint

stages.name: ai_advisory_only_boundary
stages.evidence: AI is advisory-only: providers return text under advisory fields and never a mutant status or any deterministic result field; the context validator rejects legacy single-command result payloads and over-long excerpts; closed invariant I-004 and failure mode F-020

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: AI plumbing is advisory-only and deterministic; full self-mutation dogfood is gated to the Phase 5 stages (task 085)

residual_risk: remote provider calls are out of scope here; provider.run returns a deterministic stand-in for remote and the live remote path plus the CLI ZNTL_AI_PROVIDER_NOT_ALLOWED override are owned by task 054
